introSection: Steel Lasso is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Frontier City in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, USA. The ride opened on July 18, 2008.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Steel Lasso has orange track with green supports. It is one of two 294m suspended roller coasters manufactured by Vekoma, with the other one being Jimmy Neutron's Atomic Flyer at Movie Park Germany.

fullText:
Steel Lasso is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Frontier City in Oklahoma City, Oklahoma, USA. The ride opened on July 18, 2008.

Steel Lasso has orange track with green supports. It is one of two 294m suspended roller coasters manufactured by Vekoma, with the other one being Jimmy Neutron's Atomic Flyer at Movie Park Germany.
